description_long: This is a mid-century modern wooden cabinet with a warm reddish-brown finish, featuring a combination of open shelving, a large door compartment, and four horizontal drawers. The left side of the cabinet has a tall door with a small round metallic knob, likely concealing a vertical storage space. The right side consists of four sleek, handle-less drawers stacked vertically, each with a subtle groove for opening. Above the drawers, there is an open shelving area with two shelves, ideal for displaying items or storing books. The cabinet stands on five slender metallic legs, giving it a light, elevated appearance. The back and sides are plain, showcasing the wood grain, and the overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A modern wooden cabinet with open shelves, a tall door, and four drawers, elevated on slim metal legs. The design is minimalist with a warm wood finish and metallic accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelves, tall door with a knob, and four horizontal drawers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth and stepped profile of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wooden back with no visible compartments or features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cabinet's stepped profile and plain wooden surface.
